docs.title: Introduction to Dimensional Modeling
docs.summary: Welcome to the Odibi dimensional modeling tutorial series. This comprehensive guide will teach you how to build a complete data warehouse using dimensional modeling techniques, from scratch.

docs.title: Dimension Pattern Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to use Odibi's `dimension` pattern to build dimension tables with automatic surrogate key generation and SCD (Slowly Changing Dimension) support.

docs.title: Date Dimension Pattern Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to use Odibi's `date_dimension` pattern to generate a complete date dimension table with pre-calculated attributes for reporting and analytics.

docs.title: Fact Pattern Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to use Odibi's `fact` pattern to build fact tables with automatic surrogate key lookups, orphan handling, grain validation, and measure calculations.

docs.title: Aggregation Pattern Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to use Odibi's `aggregation` pattern to build pre-aggregated tables for faster reporting and dashboards.

docs.title: Full Star Schema Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll build a complete star schema from start to finish, combining all the patterns from previous tutorials into a single, cohesive data warehouse.

docs.title: Semantic Layer Introduction
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn what a semantic layer is, why it's valuable, and how it sits on top of your star schema to provide a business-friendly query interface.

docs.title: Defining Metrics Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to define metrics in the Odibi semantic layer, from simple aggregations to complex filtered and derived metrics.

docs.title: Defining Dimensions Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to define semantic layer dimensions for grouping and filtering metrics. Dimensions are the "BY" part of queries like `"revenue BY region"`.

docs.title: Querying Metrics Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to execute queries against the semantic layer using both the unified `Project` API and the `SemanticQuery` interface.

docs.title: Materializing Metrics Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to pre-compute and persist metrics using the `Materializer` class. Materialization creates pre-aggregated tables for fast dashboard performance.

docs.title: Semantic Layer Full Example
docs.summary: This tutorial brings together everything you've learned about the semantic layer into a complete, end-to-end example.

docs.title: FK Validation Tutorial
docs.summary: In this tutorial, you'll learn how to validate foreign key relationships between fact and dimension tables to ensure data quality.
